become_driver_desc: Iyandikishe nk'utanga serivisi z'ubwikorezi kugira ngo utangire kubona akazi ko gutwara ibicuruzwa.
add_vehicle_desc: Ugomba kwandikisha imodoka mbere yo gutangira kubona akazi ko gutwara ibicuruzwa.
no_jobs: Nta kazi ko gutwara ibicuruzwa kariho ubu.
accept_success: Wemeye aka kazi ko gutwara ibicuruzwa.
waiting_client_confirmation: Ategereza ko ugura yemeza ko yabonye ibicuruzwa.
driver_verification_required: Ugomba kurangiza kwemezwa mbere yo kubona akazi.

verify_driver.title: Emeza Ubushobozi Bwawe bwo Gutwara
verify_driver.description: Ugomba kurangiza kwemezwa kwa NIDA n'uruhushya rwo gutwara mbere yo kubona akazi ko gutwara ibicuruzwa. Kwemezwa kwa TRA na LATRA k'imodoka yawe bikorwa ukwabyo, buri modoka ku giti cyayo, uva kuri "Imodoka Zanjye".
verify_driver.already_verified: Wemejwe - ushobora kubona akazi ko gutwara ibicuruzwa.
verify_driver.at_least_one_required: Uzuza nomero imwe nibura yo kwemeza.

request_service.title: Saba Gutwara Ibicuruzwa
request_service.locations_required: Hitamo aho gufata n'aho kujyana ibicuruzwa.
request_service.created: Icyifuzo cyawe cy'ubwikorezi cyoherejwe - dushaka umushoferi.
request_service.verification_required: Ugomba kwemeza uwo uri we mbere yo gusaba iyi serivisi.
request_service.no_quotes: Hitamo aho gufata n'aho kujyana ibicuruzwa kugira ngo urebe ibiciro.
request_service.proposals_heading: Ibitekerezo ku Kiguzi Biva ku Bashoferi

vehicle_types.tuk_tuk: Tuk Tuk / Ikinyabiziga cy'Amaguru Atatu (kugeza ku toni 1)
vehicle_types.public_transport: Minibisi (agasanduku gato, kugeza kuri kg 25 / km 60)
vehicle_types.bus: Bisi (agasanduku gato, kugeza kuri kg 30, urugendo rurerure)

register.title: Iyandikishe nk'Umushoferi cyangwa Isosiyete y'Ubwikorezi
register.country_hint: Ibi ni byo bigena urwego (TRA/LATRA, NTSA, URSB, n'ibindi) ruzakoreshwa mu kugukurikirana wowe n'imodoka zawe.
register.step2_desc: Ibi ni byo abakiriya bazabona igihe bahuzwa n'umushoferi w'ibicuruzwa byabo.
register.driver_required_fields: Uzuza izina ryawe na nomero y'uruhushya.
register.driver_register_failed: Kubika amakuru yawe yo gutwara byanze.
register.step3_desc: Iyi modoka izahuzwa nawe mu buryo bwikora nk'umushoferi wayo.
register.latra_placeholder: Si ngombwa - ku modoka zikoreshwa mu bucuruzi
register.next_step_verify: Intambwe ikurikira: emeza NIDA n'uruhushya rwawe rwo gutwara, hanyuma wemeze buri modoka (TRA/LATRA) hepfo, mbere yo gutangira kubona akazi.
register.confirm_unbond: Urizeye ko ushaka gukuraho iyi modoka kuri porofili yawe? Ntuzongera kubona akazi kayo kugeza ubwo uzayihuza nawe bundi bushya.
register.unbonded: Iyi modoka yakuwe kuri porofili yawe.
register.vehicle_verified: Imodoka yemejwe - ubu ishobora kubona akazi.
register.vehicle_verify_pending_or_failed: Kwemeza ntibirarangira - subiramo nomero wanditse hanyuma ongera ugerageze.
